metadata.description: AZD environment name.
Deployment location.
Prefix used for Azure resource names.
Azure Database for PostgreSQL administrator login. Use a non-reserved value.
Azure Database for PostgreSQL administrator password. Set with: azd env set POSTGRES_ADMIN_PASSWORD <value>
Application database name.
Optional MCP API key. Leave empty when MCP is not configured.
Optional MCP bearer token. Leave empty when MCP is not configured.
Optional MCP server URL.
Azure AI Foundry project name.
Azure AI Foundry chat model deployment name exposed to the backend.
Azure AI Foundry chat model format.
Azure AI Foundry chat model name.
Azure AI Foundry chat model version. Override when the target region requires a different version.
Azure AI Foundry chat deployment SKU name. Keep low-cost defaults and override per-region/quota as needed.
Azure AI Foundry chat deployment capacity.
Azure AI Foundry embeddings deployment name exposed to the backend.
Azure AI Foundry embeddings model format.
Azure AI Foundry embeddings model name.
Azure AI Foundry embeddings model version. Override when the target region requires a different version.
Azure AI Foundry embeddings deployment SKU name. Keep low-cost defaults and override per-region/quota as needed.
Azure AI Foundry embeddings deployment capacity.
Responsible AI policy name applied to model deployments.

env.value: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'APP_ENV', 'value', 'azure-apphosted'), createObject('name', 'WORKFLOW_MODE', 'value', 'maf_sdk'), createObject('name', 'STORE_PROVIDER', 'value', 'postgres'), createObject('name', 'RAG_PROVIDER', 'value', 'pgvector'), createObject('name', 'MEMORY_PROVIDER', 'value', 'postgres'), createObject('name', 'DATABASE_URL', 'secretRef', 'database-url'), createObject('name', 'OTEL_SERVICE_NAME', 'value', 'maf-order-resolution-backend'), createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', reference('monitoring').outputs.applicationInsightsConnectionString.value), createObject('name', 'FOUNDRY_PROJECTS_ENDPOINT', 'value', reference('foundry').outputs.projectEndpoint.value), createObject('name', 'FOUNDRY_MODEL_DEPLOYMENT_NAME', 'value', reference('foundry').outputs.chatDeploymentName.value), createObject('name', 'FOUNDRY_EMBEDDINGS_DEPLOYMENT_NAME', 'value', reference('foundry').outputs.embeddingsDeploymentName.value)), if(empty(parameters('mcpServerUrl')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'MCP_SERVER_URL', 'value', parameters('mcpServerUrl')))), if(empty(parameters('mcpApiKey')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'MCP_API_KEY', 'secretRef', 'mcp-api-key'))), if(empty(parameters('mcpBearerToken')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'MCP_BEARER_TOKEN', 'secretRef', 'mcp-bearer-token'))))]

value.items: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'database-url', 'value', format('postgresql://{0}:{1}@{2}:5432/{3}?sslmode=require', parameters('postgresAdministratorLogin'), parameters('postgresAdministratorPassword'), reference('postgres').outputs.fullyQualifiedDomainName.value, parameters('postgresDatabaseName')))), if(empty(parameters('mcpApiKey')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'mcp-api-key', 'value', parameters('mcpApiKey')))), if(empty(parameters('mcpBearerToken')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'mcp-bearer-token', 'value', parameters('mcpBearerToken')))))]
